input.input:
Task: Find the current weather for Colombo, Sri Lanka and produce a concise report.

Scope and requirements:
- Fetch live/current weather (not historical) for Colombo, Sri Lanka (city name: Colombo). Use reputable public sources (OpenWeatherMap, Weather.com, AccuWeather, Meteo, or the Sri Lanka Department of Meteorology). If an API key is required, use public web pages instead.
- Report must include: current temperature (°C and °F), weather description (e.g., clear, cloudy, rain), humidity (%), wind speed (km/h and mph) and direction, precipitation (if available), observation timestamp in both UTC and local Colombo time, and the data source name + URL.
- If multiple sources are available and show differing values, state the primary source chosen and note major discrepancies.
- Deliverable file: write a short, plain-language report to /_outputs/colombo_current_weather.md. Keep it concise (about 6-12 lines) and include the UTC fetch timestamp.
- Also create a one-line machine-readable JSON summary at /_outputs/colombo_current_weather.json containing keys: temperature_c, temperature_f, description, humidity, wind_kph, wind_mph, wind_direction, precipitation_mm (null if none), observation_utc (ISO 8601), source_url.

Output requirements for the agent tool:
- Do not paste full file contents in the response. Return only the paths of the created files plus a short (1-2 sentence) summary of what you saved.

Defaults: If exact observation time cannot be found, use the page fetch timestamp as observation time. Use "top source" = the clearest, most reputable source you can access.

Write both files and return paths + short summary only.

output:
Files written:
- /_outputs/colombo_current_weather.md
- /_outputs/colombo_current_weather.json

Saved a short plain-language weather report (human-readable) and a one-line machine-readable JSON summary for Colombo. Primary data source: WeatherAPI (https://www.weatherapi.com/weather/q/colombo-2842281).
